description: DataFlow Operator monitoring: manifests, SLOs (aligned with PrometheusRule alerts), messages, pipeline health, stages, latency, queues, operator reconcile, resources. Requires Prometheus; cAdvisor/kubelet for container_* panels. Docs: docs/docs/en/metrics.md

targets.expr: count(  (dataflow_status{namespace=~"$namespace", name=~"$dataflow", phase="Running"} == 1)  * on(namespace, name) (    (sum(rate(dataflow_messages_received_total{namespace=~"$namespace", name=~"$dataflow"}[$interval])) by (namespace, name) == 0)    or    (sum(rate(dataflow_messages_sent_total{namespace=~"$namespace", name=~"$dataflow"}[$interval])) by (namespace, name) == 0)  )) or vector(0)

panels.title: Stalled pipelines
panels.description: Running DataFlows with zero message throughput

targets.expr: sum(rate(dataflow_connector_errors_total{namespace=~"$namespace", name=~"$dataflow"}[$interval])) by (namespace, name, connector_type, connector_name, operation, error_type)
sum(rate(dataflow_transformer_errors_total{namespace=~"$namespace", name=~"$dataflow"}[$interval])) by (namespace, name, transformer_type, transformer_index, error_type)

sum(rate(dataflow_processing_duration_seconds_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", name=~"$dataflow"}[$interval])) by (namespace, name) / sum(rate(dataflow_processing_duration_seconds_count{namespace=~"$namespace", name=~"$dataflow"}[$interval])) by (namespace, name)
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(dataflow_transformer_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace=~"$namespace", name=~"$dataflow"}[$interval])) by (namespace, name, transformer_type, transformer_index, le))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate(dataflow_transformer_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace=~"$namespace", name=~"$dataflow"}[$interval])) by (namespace, name, transformer_type, transformer_index, le))

panels.title: Stage duration heatmap
panels.description: Rate by stage and histogram bucket

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(dataflow_task_stage_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace=~"$namespace", name=~"$dataflow"}[$interval])) by (namespace, name, stage, le))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(dataflow_task_stage_latency_seconds_bucket{namespace=~"$namespace", name=~"$dataflow"}[$interval])) by (namespace, name, from_stage, to_stage, le))

sum(rate(dataflow_messages_received_total{namespace=~"$namespace", name=~"$dataflow"}[$interval])) by (namespace, name) - sum(rate(dataflow_messages_sent_total{namespace=~"$namespace", name=~"$dataflow"}[$interval])) by (namespace, name)

panels.title: Active messages: dynamics
panels.description: Rate of change of active messages (deriv) and difference between inbound/outbound flow. Positive values — queue accumulation, negative — decrease.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(dataflow_task_queue_wait_time_seconds_bucket{namespace=~"$namespace", name=~"$dataflow"}[$interval])) by (namespace, name, queue_type, le))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate(dataflow_task_queue_wait_time_seconds_bucket{namespace=~"$namespace", name=~"$dataflow"}[$interval])) by (namespace, name, queue_type, le))
sum(rate(dataflow_connector_messages_written_total{namespace=~"$namespace", name=~"$dataflow"}[$interval])) by (namespace, name, connector_type, connector_name, route)

panels.title: Operator: memory
panels.description: Operator memory usage (container=dataflow-operator only). Requires cAdvisor/kubelet.

panels.title: Operator: CPU
panels.description: Operator CPU usage (cores). Requires cAdvisor/kubelet metrics. Filter: container=dataflow-operator.

panels.title: Processor pods: memory
panels.description: Processor pod memory usage (created via DataFlow manifests). Requires cAdvisor/kubelet metrics.

panels.title: Processor pods: CPU
panels.description: Processor pod CPU usage (cores). Requires cAdvisor/kubelet metrics.

panels.title: Resources: memory by pod (operator and processor)
panels.description: Current memory usage. Requires cAdvisor/kubelet metrics (kube-prometheus-stack, etc.).

title: DataFlow Operator
